texto: Woodrow Wilson has just made the decision to take part in World War I. What was he feeling then? Did he know the possible outcomes of his decision? Did he feel the burden of American lives on his shoulders? He probably said something like: "Goddamn. I love America but this could be the worst decision in American history." Don't worry yourself Woody, it wasn't.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Zachary Crosby: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Woodrow Wilson has just made the decision to take part in World War I. What was he feeling then? …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, america, woodrow-wilson pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e woodrow-wilson.
